events.title: Software Engineer (Full Stack) – GazinTech
events.description: After an international experience in Ireland, I returned to GazinTech with a more strategic and architecture-oriented vision, working cross-functionally across Logistics, Industry, and Wholesale domains. I became a reference for business rules and critical implementations. In recent cycles, I led the evolution of legacy cron-based systems into event-driven architectures with Apache Kafka, in addition to implementing anti-fraud solutions and resolving high-impact issues.

events.title: International Experience – Dublin, Ireland
events.description: Professional working proficiency in English (B2), working in a multicultural environment with Irish and Colombian colleagues. Participated in tech meetups focused on backend architecture and scalable distributed systems.

events.title: Postgraduate Diploma in Advanced Go Development
events.description: Postgraduate Diploma from FullCycle College of Technology, focused on microservices, concurrency, Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud-native architecture.

events.title: Software Engineer (Full Stack) – GazinTech
events.description: Maintained and scaled ERP and B2B platforms processing over R$7 million in daily transactions. Migrated legacy PHP 7.4 monoliths to modular PHP 8.1 services and Nest.js microservices using DDD, SOLID, and Hexagonal Architecture.

events.title: BSc (Hons) in Internet Systems Technology
events.description: Completed degree at Faculdade Alfa Umuarama, focusing on software engineering, web development, databases, and information security.
